headline: Constellation Brands (STZ) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
summary: Constellation Brands (STZ) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +9.43% and +1.25%, respectively, for the quarter ended February 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

raw.headline: Constellation Brands (STZ) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Molson Coors Beverage, Lowers Price Target to $45
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Chris Carey   maintains Molson Coors Beverage (NYSE:TAP) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $52 to $45.
